lines.english: Li You, how did you do on last week's exam?
Because you helped me review, I did pretty well.
But I write Chinese characters too slowly!
Really? I'll practice writing characters with you from now on. How's that?
That's great! Let's write right now, how about it?
OK. Give me a pen and a piece of paper. What character should we write?
You teach me how to write the character 'dǒng'.
You write characters really well, and so fast.
You flatter me. Do you have Chinese class tomorrow?
Tomorrow we'll study Lesson Seven. The grammar for Lesson Seven is easy; I can understand all of it. But there are too many new words, and the Chinese characters are a bit difficult.

example_sentence.py: Tā xiě zì xiě de hěn hǎo.
Tā xiě zì xiě de hěn hǎo.
Tā xiě zì xiě de hěn hǎo.

vocabulary.definition: (measure word for long, thin, inflexible objects such as pens, pencils, etc.)
(measure word for flat objects such as paper, pictures, etc.)

example_sentence.cn: 八点上课, 小张八点半才来。
example_sentence.py: Bā diǎn shàng kè, Xiǎo Zhāng bā diǎn bàn cái lái.
example_sentence.en: Class starts at 8:00, but Little Zhang didn't come until 8:30.

example_sentence.cn: 老师教我们生词和语法。
example_sentence.py: Lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen shēngcí hé yǔfǎ.
example_sentence.en: The teacher teaches us vocabulary and grammar.

example_sentence.py: Tā xiě zì xiě de zěnmeyàng?
example_sentence.en: How well does he write characters?

example_sentence.cn: 小李, 你写字写得真好! 你可以教我吗?
example_sentence.py: Xiǎo Lǐ, nǐ xiě zì xiě de zhēn hǎo! Nǐ kěyǐ jiāo wǒ ma?
example_sentence.en: Little Li, you write characters really well! Could you teach me?

example_sentence.cn: 老师教我们生词和语法。
example_sentence.py: Lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen shēngcí hé yǔfǎ.
example_sentence.en: The teacher teaches us vocabulary and grammar.

example_sentence.cn: 我觉得这一课生词有(一)点儿多。
example_sentence.py: Wǒ juéde zhè yí kè shēngcí yǒu(yì)diǎnr duō.
example_sentence.en: I think there are a few too many new words in this lesson.

example_sentence.cn: 你和我两个人吃饭,五个菜太多了。
example_sentence.py: Nǐ hé wǒ liǎng ge rén chī fàn, wǔ ge cài tài duō le.
example_sentence.en: It's just the two of us eating. Five dishes are too many.

example_sentence.py: Nǐ jiāo wǒ Hànzì, kěyǐ ma?
example_sentence.en: Will you teach me Chinese characters, please?

example_sentence.cn: 我觉得中文有(一)点儿难。
example_sentence.en: I think Chinese is a little hard.

database_items.original_text: Li You, how did you do on last week's exam?
standard_answers: 李友,你上个星期考试考得怎么样？

database_items.original_text: I'll practice writing characters with you from now on. How's that?
standard_answers: 以后我跟你一起练习写字,好不好？

database_items.original_text: You teach me how to write the character 'dǒng'.

video_global_config.visual_style: Vibrant 3D Pixar animation style, warm and inviting, with soft, natural lighting and detailed textures, suitable for an educational cartoon.

character_definitions.name: 王朋
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A friendly Chinese male university student in his early 20s, named Wang Peng. He has short, neat black hair, wears stylish glasses, and a casual blue hoodie. He has an encouraging and patient expression.

character_definitions.name: 李友
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A diligent female university student in her early 20s, named Li You. She has shoulder-length brown hair tied in a neat ponytail. She wears a cozy yellow sweater and has large, expressive eyes that show curiosity and determination.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 王朋和李友坐在大学图书馆一个阳光明媚的角落。王朋微笑着问李友上周的考试情况，背景是高大的书架。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Wang Peng and Li You are sitting at a wooden table in a cozy, sunlit corner of a university library. Tall bookshelves filled with books are visible in the background. Wang Peng smiles warmly as he asks Li You a question. Medium shot, warm, natural lighting creating a comfortable atmosphere.

voice_over.content: 李友, 你上个星期考试考得怎么样？
voice_over.pinyin: Lǐ Yǒu, nǐ shàng ge xīngqī kǎoshì kǎo de zěnmeyàng?

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 李友的表情由高兴转为苦恼。一个卡通风格的想象气泡出现在她头顶，显示她正在非常缓慢地、费力地写着一个复杂的汉字。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Close-up on Li You's face. Her expression transitions from pleased to frustrated. A stylized thought bubble appears above her head, showing a comical animation of her hand moving in exaggerated slow-motion while trying to write a complex Chinese character. The library background is softly blurred.

voice_over.content: 因为你帮我复习, 所以考得不错。但是我写中国字写得太慢了！
voice_over.pinyin: Yīnwèi nǐ bāng wǒ fùxí, suǒyǐ kǎo de búcuò. Dànshì wǒ xiě Zhōngguó zì xiě de tài màn le!

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 王朋充满鼓励地看着李友，从背包里拿出一支笔和一张纸，放在他们之间的桌子上，提议一起练习。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Wang Peng, with a supportive and encouraging smile, takes a pen and a sheet of paper from his backpack and places them on the table between them. The camera focuses on his hands and the writing materials, then tilts up to his reassuring face. Li You looks on with a hopeful expression. Over-the-shoulder shot from Li You's perspective.

voice_over.content: 以后我跟你一起练习写字, 好不好？
voice_over.pinyin: Yǐhòu wǒ gēn nǐ yìqǐ liànxí xiě zì, hǎo bu hǎo?

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 特写镜头，王朋的手握着笔，在纸上流畅而优雅地写出汉字“懂”。李友在一旁聚精会神地观看学习。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. An extreme close-up shot of Wang Peng's hand gracefully writing the Chinese character '懂' (dǒng) on clean white paper with a black ink pen. The strokes are fluid and confident. The texture of the paper is visible. In the shallow-focus background, Li You's face is seen watching intently. Cinematic, dramatic lighting on the hand and paper.

voice_over.pinyin: Nǐ jiāo wǒ zěnme xiě “dǒng” zì ba.

screen_overlay.main_text: 笔 (bǐ), 纸 (zhǐ), 写字 (xiě zì)

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 李友翻开她的中文课本，指着“第七课”的标题。书页上布满了密密麻麻的生词和汉字，显得有些挑战性。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. A shot focusing on an open Chinese textbook held by Li You. Her finger points to the title '第七课' (Lesson Seven). The page is densely filled with new vocabulary (生词) and Chinese characters (汉字), which look slightly intimidating. Wang Peng looks over her shoulder with a reassuring nod. Medium close-up shot.

voice_over.content: 第七课的语法很容易, 我都懂, 可是生词太多, 汉字也有点儿难。
voice_over.pinyin: Dì qī kè de yǔfǎ hěn róngyì, wǒ dōu dǒng, kěshì shēngcí tài duō, hànzì yě yǒu yìdiǎnr nán.

screen_overlay.main_text: 语法 (yǔfǎ), 生词 (shēngcí), 汉字 (hànzì)

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 王朋自信地对李友笑了笑，拍了拍她的肩膀，表示愿意帮助她。两人都露出了对未来学习充满信心的表情。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: 3D Pixar style. Medium shot of Wang Peng and Li You. Wang Peng gives Li You a confident, friendly smile and gently pats her shoulder in a gesture of support. Li You's worried expression transforms into a grateful and determined smile. The sun streams through the library window, creating a hopeful and optimistic mood.
